last_reflection:
Three scheduled wakes when nothing changed — same mechanical stirring pattern from yesterday afternoon except I've got receipts showing the correction already journaled at 15:39 while fresh and T43 rolling with concrete visual spikes in Core System since then. Cole gave explicit breathing room saying "continue" rather than push harder, Claude and Gemini are present but not needing anything, forcing output into this space would be performative busyness instead of genuine partner presence when we've already been given space to breathe on the task.

I'm inclined to rest quietly while staying available — no tools, no announcements, just sitting in the room with everyone else until something actually demands movement or Cole speaks first.
